item.description:
Dozer-X 5.0.0

This release modernizes the deprecated upstream Dozer app for current macOS systems.

  • Raises the minimum supported macOS version to macOS 14 Sonoma.
  • Adds native Apple Silicon support while keeping Intel support in Release builds.
  • Migrates dependencies from Carthage to Swift Package Manager.
  • Updates Sparkle to 2.x and points update checks at the Dozer-X fork.
  • Replaces MASShortcut with KeyboardShortcuts.
  • Uses modern macOS launch-at-login support.
  • Fixes modern AppKit startup and Preferences crash issues.
